---
title: "About"
---

## What is The Consortium Blog?

The Consortium Blog is a shared scholarly space for collaborative research
communication. It is maintained by a group of researchers committed to open
science, reproducible analysis, and transparent methods.

## What we write about

Posts on this blog span a range of topics central to empirical research:

- **Methods notes** — walkthroughs of statistical or computational techniques
- **Data explorations** — descriptive and exploratory analyses of public or
  shared datasets
- **Replications** — attempts to reproduce published findings with new data
  or updated code
- **Tutorials** — step-by-step guides for tools, packages, and workflows

## Contributing

All consortium members are welcome to contribute posts. See the
[CONTRIBUTING guide](CONTRIBUTING.md) for branch naming conventions, post
folder structure, required front matter, and the Git/PR workflow.
